ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "application_id" TEXT /* Application ID of the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in years */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the course */,
  "special_fee" REAL /* Special fee for the course */,
  "other_fee" REAL /* Other fee for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the students table */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the courses table */,
  "course_year" TEXT /* Year of the course (e.g., BTECH (ECE)/2) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the enrollments table */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the payment */,
  "receipt_number" TEXT /* Receipt number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the students table */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "scholarship_amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was awarded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, accountant, student) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the enrollments table */,
  "no_of_months" INTEGER /* Number of months the student is enrolled */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Tuition fee for the course */,
  "special_fee" REAL /* Special fee for the course */,
  "other_fee" REAL /* Other fee for the course */,
  "total_fee" REAL /* Total fee for the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id")
)
